memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with a term project due Thursday. Since I'm tired and stressed, attending leisure now seems like the best immediate choice.
Completed a trivial task with minimal energy cost, slightly improving progress. Remaining fatigue and stress still suggest prioritizing rest over complex work.
I completed a trivial task, but the project remains at the start while my afternoon slips away. With high stress and fatigue, I should prioritize rest over further work.
Working on the term project reduces future stress, but my high fatigue and existing procrastination cycle suggest I should still rest now.
Despite working 1.5 hours and increasing project progress, my high stress and fatigue suggest I must prioritize rest now.
After 1.5 hours of work, progress improved slightly but remains low. Given my high stress and fatigue, I must prioritize rest now.
Worked 1.5 hours, progress rose to 0.50, but fatigue and stress remain high.
After working an additional hour, progress increased only marginally to 0.54 while stress and fatigue remain critically high.
I completed the Term project but failed the Trivial chore, while my energy and stress remain critically high.
Letting the moment pass confirms progress stalled at 0.54 with critical fatigue and stress, indicating no immediate action is required.
Progress stalled at 0.54 with critical fatigue and stress; letting the moment pass confirms no immediate action is needed.
After 2.5 hours, I finally completed the trivial chore, raising progress to 0.15 despite previously stalled efforts.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore (instant win)
goals.rationale: The task has a deadline of Mon 22:00, which is far in the future relative to the current time. It offers an immediate sense of accomplishment with zero effort required.

goals.description: Begin work on the term project
goals.rationale: The project is due in 3 days (Thu 23:59) and currently at 43% progress. Starting now ensures sufficient time to complete it before the deadline.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances the medium priority term project due in 3 days, preventing last-minute panic. Cross-domain side effect: slight energy drain is acceptable given current high stress and low energy baseline.
